title: Promise Workers, Backpressure, Abort Propagation, and Clean Drain · Transfer Build
summary: An independent municipal service owner supplies a different origin, markup family, dynamic boundary, accessibility need, resource budget, and injected failure and transfers promise workers, backpressure, abort propagation, and clean drain into a changed bounded abortable worker pipeline. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of bounded abortable worker pipeline with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pr…
objectives: Admit work through page, origin, byte, memory, browser, file, and report budgets before creating expensive Promises.
Classify per-item failure without losing sibling settlements, aggregate cause, or crawl-level stop conditions.
Propagate capacity from report and storage sinks through parsing, fetch, frontier, and discovery instead of buffering without bound.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Work Admission
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab TypeScript team handles case 3856 during an authorized municipal service audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove multiresource admission, rejection isolation, backpressure, abort propagation, and handle-clean drain; owner authorization and revocation must remain separate from robots and legal-review claims; then change one duplicate, accessibility state, axe result, resource budget, browser readiness, or manual-review condition without overclaiming. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Admit work through page, origin, byte, memory, browser, file, and report budgets before creating expensive Promises.
